nasb.text: He who goes about as a talebearer reveals secrets, But he who is trustworthy conceals a matter.

esv.text: Whoever goes about slandering reveals secrets, but he who is trustworthy in spirit keeps a thing covered.

cnv.text: 到處搬弄是非的，洩露祕密， 心裡誠實的，遮隱事情。

ccb.text: 嚼舌者泄露秘密， 忠信者守口如瓶。

csbs.text: 到处搬弄是非的，泄露秘密； 内心忠实的，遮隐事情。
